subject: Klefki — small white keyring creature carrying multiple keys, colorful playful background
description: A small white creature shaped like a keyring holds several keys dangling from its body. It has a simple round face with a cheerful or neutral expression, and its limbs are extended as if in motion. The background is bright and colorful, suggesting an urban or domestic setting with warm hues. The creature is the visual focal point against the vivid, slightly abstract background.
foreground: small white keyring creature with multiple dangling keys
background: bright colorful setting, warm hues, abstract urban
